meaning: adj.漆黑的,墨水的,给墨水弄污的
examples: He shook his head, then rolled up his tracksuit leg to reveal an inky series of scratchings covering his calf, which depicted... I don't really know what.
The moon was rising in the inky sky.
She smiled while slurping the inky noodles, while dissecting the antennaed prawns.
An onyx-winged cormorant arced downward, diving below the inky water while a hippo yawned its tusky jaws.
An inky creature lunging at him looked breathtakingly similar to the Shoggoth with symmetrical tentacles.
